color-no-hex.message: ❌ Hex colors are prohibited outside @theme blocks. Use CSS variables (var(--color-*)) or Tailwind classes instead.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: ❌ Hardcoded spacing values are prohibited. Use var(--spacing-*) tokens or Tailwind spacing classes.

custom-property-pattern.message: ❌ Custom properties must follow TerraFusion naming convention: --{category}-{name}

selector-class-pattern.message: ❌ Class names must use kebab-case. Prefer Tailwind utility classes over custom CSS.
